home.heroTitle: One living world. Three ways in.
home.heroSubtitle: Grow a 3D nature space, exhibit your art among the trees, or let your photographs drift in living light — right in your browser.
home.sectionGalleryBody: Art and photographs drift among leaves and light. Move your cursor and the whole grove leans in to meet you.
home.sectionCreateBody: Place trees, rocks, flowers and ponds. Set the wind, wake the butterflies, and let the sun cross your sky.
home.sectionShareBody: Join Natura78 to save your spaces, return to them anytime, and open them to other wanderers.
home.audiencesTitle: Made for three kinds of wanderers
home.audienceNatureBody: Plant forests, set the wind, wake butterflies and fireflies — grow a living 3D world that's yours.
home.audienceArtBody: Exhibit your work in a space that moves — pieces hang in living light instead of white walls.
home.audiencePhotoBody: Your photographs drift in floating frames among the trees, seen the way light meant them to be.

footer.tagline: A living corner of the internet — for nature, art and photography.
footer.credits: Every world here is grown right in your browser

auth.signInSubtitle: Your spaces have kept growing while you were away.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Create an account to save your spaces and share them.
auth.checkEmail: Almost there — check your email to confirm your account.
auth.notConfigured: Accounts aren't available yet. Please try again later.

images.title: My images
images.empty: Upload photos or artwork to hang them in your space.
images.hint: Click an image, then click the ground to hang it.
images.signInPrompt: Sign in to upload your own images.

editor.plantHint: Click the ground to plant it. Esc to stop.

gallery.hint: Click a picture to come closer

viewer.walkHint: Click to look around · WASD or arrows to walk · Esc to release
viewer.interactHint: Press E to view this piece

explore.title: Explore spaces
explore.subtitle: Wander through worlds other people have made.
explore.emptyBody: Be the first — grow a space and open it to everyone.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Choose the scenarios that feel like home — one, two, or all three.
profile.heroHint: Feature one of your spaces on the home page, or keep the default scenarios.
profile.heroEmpty: Save a space first and you'll be able to feature it on the home page.
profile.notConfigured: Profiles aren't available yet. Please try again later.

mySpaces.title: My spaces
mySpaces.subtitle: Everything you've planted, saved in one place.
mySpaces.emptyBody: Your saved spaces will appear here.
